full_text:
Lun Zhi 倫直
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lun Zhi (倫直). He was beheaded for criticizing Gongsun Yuan’s plan to revolt. Lun Zhi was affiliated with Gongsun Yuan. Lun Zhi lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
